headline: Shopify Stock Slumps After Earnings. What Left the Market Wanting.
summary: Shopify  stock fell Tuesday after the e-commerce platform reported continued top-line growth but weak earnings in the first quarter.  After including investment losses, Shopify swung to a loss of 45 cents a share in the quarter.  Shopify stock fell 6.3% in premarket trading.

headline: PayPal Earnings Beat Estimates, but the Rest of the Release Left More Questions for the Stock.
summary: PayPal  stock barely moved Tuesday after the company reported better-than-expected earnings but issued a downbeat outlook for the current quarter.  The payments giant reported adjusted earnings of $1.34 a share for the first quarter, up from $1.33 a year ago and ahead of analysts’ consensus estimate of $1.27, per FactSet.  PayPal reiterated its full-year guidance for a “low-single digit decline to slightly positive” growth in adjusted earnings per share.

PayPal reiterated its full-year guidance for a “low-single digit decline to slightly positive” growth in adjusted earnings per share.

headline: Reported Earlier: FactSet Raises Quarterly Dividend From $1.10 To $1.16/Share
summary: FactSet (NYSE:FDS, NASDAQ:FDS), a global financial digital platform and enterprise solutions provider, today announced that its Board of Directors approved an increase in the regular quarterly cash dividend to $1.16 per share from $1.10 per share.

headline: FactSet Increases Dividend
summary: NORWALK, Conn., May 05, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- FactSet (NYSE: FDS | NASDAQ: FDS), a global financial digital platform and enterprise solutions provider, today announced that its Board of Directors approved an increase in the regular quarterly cash dividend to $1.16 per share from $1.10 per share. headline: 2 Reasons to Avoid FDS and 1 Stock to Buy Instead
summary: Over the last six months, FactSet’s shares have sunk to $225.25, producing a disappointing 14.9% loss - a stark contrast to the S&P 500’s 6.4% gain. This may have investors wondering how to approach the situation.
